jobs.title: Consumer
jobs.description: At Bessemer, we believe the future is built by creators, curators, community leaders, and co-owners. As commerce and communities transform on and off line, new distribution channels are emerging and our world is changing how we all connect, shop, and play. We back audacious founders, across internet marketplaces, gaming, creator tools, and more, enabling and empowering today’s hybrid reality. jobs.description: Cybersecurity is finally taking its rightful place at the center stage of the global business and geopolitical landscape. jobs.title: Is there a membership fee for Greylock X?
jobs.description: No, it is by invitation-only and membership to this fellowship is completely free. Do I need to intern with one of Greylock's portfolio companies to be approved for Greylock X? No, this is a standalone fellowship for entrepreneurial students who want to found a company now, or in the future. Will I be required to bring Greylock on as an investor when I start a company? Not at all. We support Greylock X fellows however we can, which may include an investment partnership at some point, although th
